text.title: Champion Challenger Pattern for RAG Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the champion-challenger-pattern-rag methodology end-to-end.

step.name: bootstrap-champion
step.action: Snapshot the current config as `champion_v0`. Commit to repo; tag with date.

step.name: design-challenger
step.action: Pick one variable to change (chunk size / embedding model / reranker / prompt). Snapshot as `challenger_v1`.
step.decision-gate: If the change is multi-variable, split into separate bench cycles.

step.name: wire-shadow-traffic
step.action: Mirror queries to challenger; capture challenger response separately. Verify zero leak to user-visible paths.
step.decision-gate: If failover path can route to challenger response, fix that first — leak is fatal to the bench.

step.name: run-cycle-and-judge
step.input: 7 days of shadow traffic + judge rubric or LLM-as-judge
step.action: Score every query: champion vs challenger. Compute mean delta + n + safety regressions.
step.output: Cycle report: delta_pp, n, safety incidents

step.name: promote-or-bench-again
step.action: If delta ≥ 3pp AND n ≥ 1000 AND safety_regressions == 0, promote challenger to champion. Otherwise, restart cycle with new challenger.
step.output: New champion deployed with 24h rollback watch OR new bench cycle started
step.decision-gate: After promotion, monitor for 24h; auto-rollback if user-facing performance regresses > 5pp.
